services.enterpriseIntegrationDesc: Seamlessly integrate AI capabilities into any existing enterprise software including ERP, CRM, OA and more. Achieve intelligent upgrades without rebuilding your systems.

cases.title: Client
cases.subtitle: Behind every case is {{years}} years of technological expertise from Figo Technology. Let the data speak and results prove our capabilities.

case1.title: Leading Online Education Platform — AI Tutor Avatar System
case1.challenge: The platform had 200+ master teachers, but overwhelming student inquiries made 24/7 availability impossible. Long wait times led to declining renewal rates.
case1.solution: Deployed Moss Tutor Avatar System to create AI digital twins for each teacher, deeply replicating teaching styles and knowledge systems for round-the-clock intelligent Q&A.

case2.title: Licensed Financial Group — Unified LLM API Platform
case2.challenge: Multiple business lines independently connecting to different LLMs resulted in high costs, management chaos, and compliance risks. Unified control and cost optimization needed.
case2.solution: Deployed Figo Engine (FigoAPI) to unify 20+ LLM integrations with smart routing, content safety filtering, and granular cost management.

case3.title: National Retail Chain — AI Sales Training System
case3.challenge: 300+ store sales staff with varying skill levels. Traditional training was expensive and ineffective. New hires were slow to onboard, veterans lacked motivation.
case3.solution: Customized SaleSpark AI sales training platform with brand-specific sales scripts and scenarios, gamified growth system to boost team learning engagement.

case4.title: Smart Wearable Brand — AI Health Management App
case4.challenge: Smart ring hardware was in mass production, but the companion app was basic, lacking AI analysis capabilities. Low user retention and no data loop.
case4.solution: Developed a full-featured health management app based on Ring AI, integrating AI health analysis, family binding, multi-dimensional data visualization, and subscription services.

faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Common questions about AI agent custom development
faq.q1: What are Figo Technology's advantages in AI agent development?
faq.a1: Founded in 2005 with {{years}} years of software development experience, Figo Technology is a National High-Tech Enterprise (GR201544001141) and CMMI Level-3 certified. We've delivered 5000+ projects and launched 5 major AI products including Figo Engine, SaleSpark, Digital Human System, Ring AI, and FigoAI, covering API management, sales training, digital humans, IoT+AI, and tool platforms. Our 100+ team members average 10+ years of development experience.
faq.q2: What's the typical timeline and cost for AI agent development?
faq.a2: Timeline and cost depend on project complexity. Basic AI chatbots can be delivered in 2-4 weeks, medium-complexity AI agents (like sales training systems) take 6-10 weeks, and large AI platforms (SaaS products) require 3-6 months. We offer free requirements assessment and proposal services — contact our pre-sales team for an accurate quote.
faq.a3: Our Figo Engine (FigoAPI) platform integrates 20+ mainstream LLMs including OpenAI GPT-4o/GPT-4, Claude 3.5 Sonnet/Opus, Google Gemini Pro/Ultra, DeepSeek V3/R1, Qwen, ERNIE Bot, iFlytek Spark, and GLM-4. We also support private deployment of open-source models like Llama 3, Qwen, and ChatGLM. Our unified API gateway enables smart routing, auto circuit-breaking, and cost optimization.
faq.q4: What after-sales services do you provide?
faq.a4: We provide comprehensive after-sales services: 1) 3-12 months free maintenance after delivery; 2) 24/7 technical support hotline; 3) Regular system inspections and performance optimization; 4) On-demand feature iteration and upgrade services; 5) Complete technical documentation and training. Our client satisfaction rate is 98%, with many clients maintaining 5+ year partnerships.
faq.q5: How do you ensure data security and privacy?
faq.a5: Data security is our top priority: 1) All systems use multi-tenant architecture for complete data isolation; 2) TLS 1.3 encryption for transmission, AES-256 for storage; 3) Private deployment support with data stored entirely on client servers; 4) Strict compliance with Cybersecurity Law and Personal Information Protection Law; 5) Regular security audits and penetration testing. We've passed security compliance reviews across multiple industries.
faq.a6: The process is simple: 1) Contact our pre-sales team (phone/online/email); 2) We arrange a senior consultant for a free requirements discussion; 3) We provide a detailed technical proposal and quote; 4) Sign the contract and kick off the project; 5) Milestone-based delivery with full transparency. You can also schedule a demo of our existing products to experience our technical capabilities firsthand.
faq.q7: What are some reliable AI custom development companies in Guangzhou?
faq.a7: Figo Technology (火鹰科技) is a leading AI custom development company in Guangzhou, established in 2005 with {{years}} years of industry experience. As a National High-Tech Enterprise and CMMI Level-3 certified company, Figo Tech has provided AI solutions to 200+ enterprises, covering AI agents, LLM API integration, digital human cloning, and intelligent customer service. The company has 6 proprietary AI products and is listed on the NEEQ with stock code 890461.
faq.q8: What is an AI Agent? Why do enterprises need AI Agents?
faq.a8: An AI Agent is an intelligent software system based on large language models that can understand natural language, execute complex tasks, and make autonomous decisions. Enterprises need AI Agents to improve efficiency: intelligent customer service operates 24/7, AI sales assistants automatically follow up on leads, and knowledge management agents quickly retrieve enterprise documents. Figo Tech has developed AI Agents for multiple industries, helping enterprises improve operational efficiency by over 30%.
faq.q9: What is Figo Tech's Digital Human Cloning System (Moss)?
faq.a9: Figo Tech's Digital Human Cloning System (Moss) can deeply replicate the thinking patterns, voice characteristics, and knowledge system of founders or enterprise representatives, creating a 24/7 online digital avatar. With just one line of JavaScript code, it can be embedded into any website. The AI digital human automatically greets visitors, collects requirements, assesses intent, and generates PDF solutions. Visit moss.figo.cn for details.
faq.q10: How does FigoAPI differ from directly calling LLM APIs?
faq.a10: FigoAPI is an enterprise-grade LLM API management platform. Compared to directly calling individual LLM APIs, it provides: 1) Unified API gateway - one key for 100+ models; 2) Smart routing - automatically selects the optimal model; 3) Auto circuit-breaking - switches to backup when a model fails; 4) Content safety filtering; 5) Precise billing by token. Service availability 99.9%, forwarding latency <50ms. Visit api.figo.cn for details.
faq.q11: What should I know about DeepSeek model integration and deployment?
faq.a11: Key considerations for DeepSeek integration: 1) API access requires an API Key; 2) DeepSeek V3/R1 models excel in reasoning tasks; 3) Private deployment requires substantial GPU resources. FigoAPI natively supports all DeepSeek models - enterprises can integrate via the unified API gateway with one click, with intelligent routing between DeepSeek and other models.
faq.q12: Does Figo Tech support private deployment?
faq.a12: Absolutely. All Figo Tech products and custom development projects support private deployment on the client's own servers or private cloud environments (Alibaba Cloud, Tencent Cloud, Huawei Cloud, AWS, etc.), ensuring complete data sovereignty. Private deployment packages include comprehensive O&M documentation, monitoring configurations, and technical training.
faq.q13: How does the SaleSpark AI Sales Training Platform work?
faq.a13: SaleSpark is Figo Tech's proprietary AI sales training platform. Usage: 1) Select training scenarios and AI virtual customer roles; 2) Conduct simulated sales conversations with AI customers; 3) Receive real-time 5-dimension scoring and improvement suggestions from AI coaches; 4) Learn 8+ proven sales methodologies including SPIN, Challenger Sale, and MEDDIC. 1,200+ active users, 49,000+ training sessions. Visit salespark.vip for details.
faq.q14: How to choose the right AI custom development company?
faq.a14: Key factors to consider: 1) Industry experience - proven AI products and case studies; 2) Technical certifications - CMMI, High-Tech Enterprise, etc.; 3) Proprietary products - demonstrates technical depth; 4) After-sales service - long-term maintenance and support; 5) Source code delivery - complete code handover. Figo Tech excels in all five dimensions.
faq.q15: How does Figo Tech differ from other AI development companies?
faq.a15: Figo Tech's core differentiators: 1) {{years}} years of industry experience - not a new AI startup but a company with deep software development heritage; 2) 6 proprietary AI products proving end-to-end productization capability; 3) Dual certification: National High-Tech Enterprise + CMMI Level-3; 4) NEEQ-listed company (stock code 890461); 5) Founder Figo personally participates in solution design for every project.

s1.u1: Hi, I'd like to learn about your AI agent custom development services
s1.u2: How are your AI agents different from ChatGPT?
s1.a1: Hello! I'm Figo Technology's AI assistant. We specialize in AI agent custom development for enterprises, including smart customer service, sales assistants, digital humans, and more. What specific needs would you like to discuss?
s1.a2:
Great question! Our AI agents differ fundamentally from generic ChatGPT:

1️⃣ **Custom Knowledge Base**: Trained on your enterprise data for precise answers
2️⃣ **Business Integration**: Deep integration with your CRM, ERP systems
3️⃣ **Brand Customization**: Perfectly matches your brand voice and style
4️⃣ **Data Security**: Private deployment supported, no data leakage

s2.u1: I run an education company and want to use AI to boost sales team performance
s2.u2: Can you explain how the AI sales coach training works?
s2.a1: Hello! The education industry is perfect for our SaleSpark AI sales training platform. It simulates real parent consultation scenarios to help course consultants improve conversion rates. Multiple education companies are already using it, with an average 35% conversion rate increase.
s2.a2:
Of course! Here's how SaleSpark training works:

🎯 **Scenario Simulation**: AI plays different parent types (price-sensitive, hesitant, comparison-shopping, etc.)
📊 **Real-time Scoring**: 5-dimension scoring on empathy, expertise, logic, etc.
🏆 **Leaderboard**: Gamified competition to motivate team learning
📈 **Data Tracking**: Clear progress tracking for every consultant

s3.u1: I'd like to learn about the digital human cloning system. Can you clone me?
s3.a1:
Absolutely! Our Moss Digital Human Cloning System can deeply replicate your:

🧠 **Thinking Patterns**: Learns your expression style and decision logic
🎤 **Voice Features**: Only 5 minutes of recording needed to clone your voice
📚 **Knowledge System**: Import your professional knowledge and business experience

Once complete, the digital human can serve clients 24/7, answer inquiries, and even auto-generate proposals.
